headline: Lionsgate: Will Continue To Roar
summary: LION trades at less than 10x TTM library EBITDA, with a 12x multiple implying over $13/share value and free upside from production assets. Read the full stock analysis here.

headline: Gary Black Cites Netflix-Warner Bros Deal To Caution Against SpaceX-Tesla Merger: 'Who Will Purchase The $50B…'
summary: Investor Gary Black warns against SpaceX-Tesla merger, citing failed Netflix-Warner Bros. Discovery deal and dilution concerns.
